name: specialists-ecomm
description: Domain plugin for commercial webshop repos (any platform): the SEO specialist Sergio, the CRO specialist Craig, and the performance/SEA specialist Sean, with room to grow into the wider e-commerce craft (lifecycle/email, analytics). Deliberately NOT repo-neutral — only a commercial webshop repo enables this plugin. The governance layer (CLAUDE.md + repo lenses) and the shared core (plugin 'specialists') stay separate.
